text:
There was once a young girl named Lily who lived in a quiet village. Every morning she would walk dreamily through the whispering woods, chasing after dreams that never really seemed real.

One sunny afternoon, while playing detective, she stumbled upon an old stone ring. Fascinated, she put on an old ring she'd found. Suddenly, huge owl ears tufted atop her head!

She gasped, clutching the ring. Owls were nocturnal! But then, an owl spoke with human kindness, "Just a little magic here."

Could it be? With solemn pride, owl Lily spoke, "I see stories... tell them."

Together they recounted tales of courage, love, and the beauty of dreams. Birds flew down to listen. A swALLOW sang a laugh. A NIGHTHOLEivor oooo'd.

The owl gave Lily an owl feather.

"Guard my dreams."

With a silent promise, she tucked it away.

Every night she'd sleep with that feather. Dawn
